segments.en: Here are the directions for part 2.
segments.zh: 以下是Part 2的指示。

segments.en: In this part, you will hear six passages A through F. Each passage will be followed
segments.zh: 在这一部分，你将听到六篇短文A到F。

segments.en: by two questions, number 13 through number 24.
segments.zh: 每篇短文后有两个问题，编号从13到24。

segments.en: For each question, you will have ten seconds to choose the best answer and mark your answer
segments.zh: 每个问题，你有十秒钟选择最佳答案并标记答案。

segments.en: on your answer sheet.
segments.zh: 在答题纸上。

segments.en: The passage and the questions will be given only once.
segments.zh: 短文和问题只播放一次。

segments.en: Now, let's begin.
segments.zh: 现在开始。

segments.en: A. Typhon
segments.zh: A. 堤丰

segments.en: Typhon was one of the most terrifying creatures in ancient Greek mythology.
segments.zh: 堤丰是古希腊神话中最可怕的生物之一。

segments.en: He was believed to be a giant whose lower body was that of a snake, and he had enormous wings.
segments.zh: 人们相信他是一个下半身像蛇的巨人，拥有巨大的翅膀。

segments.en: Typhon could breathe fire and create powerful storms, and he threw large rocks during battles.
segments.zh: 堤丰能喷火、制造强烈风暴，并在战斗中投掷巨石。

segments.en: According to legend, Typhon had numerous offspring, many of which were fearsome creatures.
segments.zh: 据传说，堤丰有很多后代，其中许多是可怕的生物。

segments.en: They included the three-headed dog who guarded the entrance to the underworld.
segments.zh: 其中包括守护地狱入口的三头狗。

segments.en: Greek myths often helped to explain the natural world.
segments.zh: 希腊神话常被用来解释自然界。

segments.en: In one story, Typhon rebelled against Zeus, the ruler of the gods, trying to take his place.
segments.zh: 在一个故事中，堤丰反抗众神之王宙斯，试图取代他的位置。

segments.en: After a long battle, Zeus managed to defeat him using lightning bolts and then threw Typhon
segments.zh: 经过漫长的战斗，宙斯用雷电击败了他，然后将堤丰

segments.en: into a deep hole in the ground.
segments.zh: 扔进了地面的一个深洞里。

segments.en: Zeus then placed Mount Etna on top of him.
segments.zh: 宙斯随后在他上面放置了埃特纳火山。

segments.en: Mount Etna is a real volcano, so fire-breathing Typhon appears to have been an explanation
segments.zh: 埃特纳火山是一座真实的火山，因此喷火的堤丰似乎成为了

segments.en: for the origin of the volcano.
segments.zh: 火山起源的解释。

segments.en: Questions.
segments.zh: 问题。

segments.en: Number 13.
segments.zh: 第13题。

segments.en: What is one thing that the ancient Greeks believed about Typhon?
segments.zh: 古希腊人对堤丰有什么看法？

segments.en: Number 14.
segments.zh: 第14题。

segments.en: Why was Typhon punished?
segments.zh: 为什么堤丰受到惩罚？
